short_description: Personal Government Zone is a new application that makes digital services accessible to residents
full_description:
Government Personal Area is a new application that provides access to digital services for residents, businesses and cooperative associations in Israel. The application is highly secure and allows you to pay payments, receive information, download digitally signed official documents and perform actions with the government.
• The application concentrates government services under one roof, and you can easily find everything you need. For example: downloading the Taz appendix, downloading a car license and more
• The application allows you to perform actions easily and quickly, anytime and anywhere. For example: changing a license plate, activating a TZ, transferring ownership of a vehicle, associating a vehicle with a disabled tag, and more
• The app is highly secure to protect your personal information.
• The application is easy to use and allows you to perform actions easily and quickly.
Download the app now and start using the government services easily and conveniently!
